user.title: Connect to Helianthus
user.description: Enter the Helianthus GraphQL host and port.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Helianthus GraphQL endpoint.
error.invalid_response: Helianthus responded with an invalid identity payload.
error.requires_gateway_upgrade: The Helianthus gateway must be updated before this integration can bind to it.
error.missing_instance_guid: The Helianthus gateway did not expose a stable instance GUID.
error.identity_mismatch: Discovered identity did not match the verified Helianthus gateway.

abort.already_configured: This Helianthus endpoint is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the discovered Helianthus GraphQL endpoint.
abort.invalid_response: The discovered Helianthus gateway returned an invalid identity payload.
abort.requires_gateway_upgrade: The discovered Helianthus gateway must be updated before it can be added.
abort.missing_instance_guid: The discovered Helianthus gateway did not advertise a stable instance GUID.
abort.identity_mismatch: Discovery TXT data did not match the verified Helianthus gateway identity.
abort.duplicate_instance_guid: Another live Helianthus endpoint already claims this instance GUID. Automatic rebinding was refused.
abort.reconfigured: The existing Helianthus entry was rebound to the rediscovered endpoint.
